    MiiCondition - Class in de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.resources
     
    MiiCondition() - Constructor for class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.resources.MiiCondition
    Deprecated.
    This constructor is only used for Fhir resource validation purpose. Use other constructors for creating an instance of this resource.
    MiiCondition(MiiContactHealthFacility, CodeableConcept, CodeableConcept, Date) - Constructor for class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.resources.MiiCondition
     
    MiiCondition(MiiPatient, MiiContactHealthFacility, CodeableConcept, CodeableConcept, Date) - Constructor for class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.resources.MiiCondition
     
    MiiCondition(String, String, CodeableConcept, CodeableConcept, Date) - Constructor for class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.resources.MiiCondition
    Creates a new condition object without defined MiiPatient and MiiContactHealthFacility objects, these objects may be assigned later using MiiCondition.initializeMiiPatient(MiiPatient) or MiiCondition.initializeMiiContactHealthFacility(MiiContactHealthFacility).

    millisToMicros(long) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.misc.FhirTools
    Convert the given Unix-time in milliseconds to microseconds by multiplying the value with 10^3.
    millisToSeconds(long) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.misc.FhirTools
    Convert the given Unix-time in milliseconds to seconds by dividing the value by 10^3.
